message:
🐛 Fix remaining MCP test failures blocking releases (#5067)

Update test assertions to match handler behavior from #4908:
- Network/auth/timeout errors return 503 (not 200)
- Internal errors return errorMessage (not error) in payload
- Events and Nodes network error tests expect 503

These tests were not caught by the previous fix (#5059) because
they only ran in the release workflow, not in PR checks.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
